ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-10-2018 Continued To Jan-07-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bruce Thompson appeared by telephone for David Soyster.

Mr. Thompson stated that it was a relatively small asset, that the Executor transferred it to the Trust, that he has not filed a statement and that he can have it filed within one week. The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to January 7, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file something showing the amount received from the bonds and that the funds were deposited into the Trust.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-25-2018 Continued To May-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Thompson (via Court Call) for (petitioner) David Soyster.

The Court stated that this is a petition for probate, that there are issues raised regarding not having the identity and addresses of the beneficiaries to be able to confirm that everyone has been served. Mr. Thompson stated that when the bequests were paid they were not longer beneficiaries, that they filed a statement yesterday regarding payments and who they went to, that they are trying to get an asset into the trust and that the examiner has information to verify that the bequests were made in the trust. The Court stated that it will take the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary under submission, that it will review the document and that if it is not satisfied the matter will go back on calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Continued To Oct-18-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bruce Thompson (via court call) for (petitioner) David Soyster.

The Court stated that this is a petition for probate, that there is an issue with notice, cited 1208(b) that if the executor is also a trustee they must include notice to everyone who is entitled to distribution from the trust. Mr. Thompson stated that the specific beneficiaries have already been paid and that there is no need to notice them. The Court stated that they could either waive notice, file receipts for distribution or give notice. Mr. Thompson stated that it would be easiest to give notice. The Court continued the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary to October 18, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice to be sent.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-17-2016 Continued To Sep-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
